titleStmt.title: SII 9.112: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 122. (A.R. No. 291 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT NANDIKAMBA, HAMLET OF PUNABAGATTA, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 974, Māgha, amāvāsye, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1053 January 22 Friday, Kumbha-saṅkramaṇa, in the Uttarāyaṇa period. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Nāgātyarasa of the Kadamba family as ruling over Kadambaḷige thousand. It records that Nāgātyarasa with Pergaḍe Mākimayya, and others of the place, made a gift of some land for the service of the god Kadambēśvaradēva of Huḷibeyaghaṭṭa, after washing the feet of the teacher Sōmēśvara-Paṇḍita. The stone-mason, Māṇikāchāri, was granted 5 koḷagas of land and Hiriya-Chāvuṇḍōja and Kiriya-Chāvuṇḍōja 10 kolagas of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
svara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
ttraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivirddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire Ākāladoḷu samastāvanītalavirā
jamāna Avanipatimakuṭaghaṭṭitacaraṇāravinda
yugmaḷa banavāsipuravarēśvara mrigēndralāṁcana permaṭṭipaṟaghō
ṣaṇa parivēṣṭita pitalalāṭalōcana Aṣṭāda
śāsvamēdhādidīkṣita rudraprasūta nātha mayūravarmmavansōdbhavaṁ
kadambarādityar tappetappuvar balaladaṁbanaṇniganasiṅgha nāmādi
samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmat kōṭeya nāgātyarasaru kadaṁbaḷige sāsira
da manneyamaṁ sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdamāḷuttamiṟdu sakavaruṣa 974 naṁdana
saṁvatsarada māghadamāvāse Ādityavāraduttarāyaṇasankrānti dvitīpāta
daṁdu nāgātyarasaru Avara belebaḷadaḻiya perggaḍe mākimayyana
vapemmeyanu karaṇadalaṇni lātana dokkalumiḻdu sva sti ya
maniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiṣaḍaṁgōpa(upa)hārādisaṁ
panna sakalasāstrapārāvārapāragaru sarasvatī trēyagōtrapavi
traru gurukuḷasamuddharuṇaru śivapadapaṁkajabhramara nāmādisamastaprasa
stisahitaṁ śrīmatsōmēśvara paṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi huḷibeya
ghaṭṭada kadaṁbēsvaradēvargge Aḷiyamannayadeṟe Ēnondādaḍaṁ sarvvana
masyaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru Idanaḷidavaru vāraṇāśi gurukṣētra prayāgeyalu
sāśra ḷiṁgamumaṁ sāsirvvartapōdhanarumaṁ sāśra gaviḷeyumaṁ sāśra brā
hmaṇarumanaṟida mahāpātakaṁ . mikkaḷidaṁ tannahiriyamagana kapō
ḻadaḷuṇḍa Āvanādaḍe vakrabandavana naṣṭasaṁtati Akku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēdvasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
vasudhā bahubhirbhuktā rājabhissagarādhibhiḥ . yasya yasya yathā bhūmi tasya tasya tathā
phalaṁ . kalukuṭiga māṇikacārige Aiguḷaga bede gaṟdeyu beḻdele matta
ru Eraḍu hiriyacāvuṁḍōjarggu kiriyacāvuṁḍōjargge hattukuḷaga
gaḻdeyu nālugumattarbeḻdeleyumaṁ biṭṭukoṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
